contexts.context: RD: I would be against adding <mark>polymorphism</mark> into the language because that can get quite complicated…
SF: When you say <mark>polymorphism</mark> will create ambiguity, we could use scoping to…
…it with arrays and vice versa. So the <mark>polymorphism</mark> described here is that in that case the function…
…size function with a type switch and doing the <mark>polymorphism</mark> manually. I’m open to how to avoid code…
… The parcel simplifies the <mark>polymorphism</mark> in the array instruction.
…easier to understand. It doesn’t try to be <mark>polymorphic</mark> depending on the arguments.
